title: Squirrel Removal in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Kew Gardens Hills attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout this vibrant Queens neighborhood. Our licensed technicians safely remove squirrels, seal entry points, and protect your property from future intrusions with proven, humane methods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens Hills homeowners for years with specialized squirrel removal expertise tailored to the area's unique mix of single-family homes and multi-unit buildings. Our team responds quickly, works efficiently, and guarantees long-lasting results with comprehensive exclusion services that keep squirrels out for good.
localContext: Kew Gardens Hills' tree-lined streets near landmarks like the Queens College campus and the bustling Main Street corridor create ideal squirrel habitats that often lead to attic and roof invasions. The neighborhood's charming Tudor and colonial-style homes, along with its numerous apartment buildings, require specialized approaches to effectively address squirrel entry points and nesting areas.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Kew Gardens Hills typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and prevention measures to ensure squirrels don't return.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Kew Gardens Hills home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Kew Gardens Hills squirrel removal calls within 24 hours and can begin the removal process immediately. Most squirrel extractions are completed within 3-7 days, though the timeline depends on the number of squirrels and accessibility of nesting areas in your attic or walls.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to homes in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), gnawing on wooden beams and insulation, contaminating attics with urine and droppings, and creating multiple entry holes in soffits, vents, and rooflines. Early removal prevents costly repairs and protects your home's structural integrity.

faqs.question: Do you use humane squirrel removal methods?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical squirrel removal techniques that comply with New York wildlife regulations. We employ live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit safely without re-entry, followed by comprehensive sealing to prevent future access while respecting local wildlife.
